---
name: Roast a rule
about: A rule is wrong, overstated, missing a nuance, or would flag fine code
title: "[rule] "
labels: rule-feedback
---

**Rule id**

<!-- e.g. ROU-2, STO-3. One rule per issue. -->

**What is wrong with it**

<!-- Wrong claim, inflated severity, missing jurisdiction nuance, a detection pattern that
would flag legitimate code, a dead or off-point source, etc. -->

**Evidence**

<!-- A source that backs your position (spec, standard, primary vendor doc, canonical
literature). Rules change when the counter-claim is sourced as well as the claim. For a
jurisdiction point, name the law/regulation/notice. For a false positive, a minimal code
snippet the rule would wrongly flag. -->

**Suggested change**

<!-- Optional: how you would reword it, re-rate the severity, or scope the detection. -->
